name: Earth Wyrm
tips: Leap lets it burrow past blockers — a 33🗡️/33🤍 that cannot be body-blocked forces awkward trades.
A Leap whose path is ALL enemy minions ending past the back row is a Sacrifice line: 33🗡️ straight to the face.
Tree Wyrm's tutor fetches Earth Wyrms — 'Tutor 2 Wyrms' restocks the burrowers.
Like Rathopper, it still only moves forward in its column — Leap changes what it can move THROUGH, not where.
Sacrificing it is a two-for-one: 33🗡️ to the face AND a free Wyrm back from the grave.
rulings: Leap follows the same rules as Rathopper's: forward in its own column, hopping over occupied tiles to the next empty one.
Landing rules, react windows, and the post-move attack pick are identical to a normal Move.
Summon: Draw 1 fires after the summon resolves (Window B); a full hand overdraw-burns the drawn card.
Sacrifice: Revive fires after the sacrifice damage lands — pick any Wyrm in your graveyard EXCEPT an Earth Wyrm (no self-loops) and place it like a normal revive.
The revive is optional: the picker's Done button skips it. Declining refunds nothing.
